properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: The day of redemption is near, Men’s hearts are failing for fear, Be filled with the Spirit, your lamps trimmed and clear, Look up! Your redemption is near.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: Heaven’s powers are shaking, and many are mistaking God’s meaning to be of the sky; God’s Church is the power that’s shaking this hour: The day of redemption is nigh.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: False prophets are lying, God's Truth they’re denying That Jesus the Christ is our God; Though this generaton spurns God’s revelation, We’ll walk where the apostles have trod.
